backend/main.mo: Main actor for the IPGT backend, handling user profile management, IP record registration and querying (with pagination, title search, category/owner filtering), and access control via mixins for storage and authorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (which included token ledger fields) into the new actor state by preserving IP records, next ID counter, and user profiles while dropping all token-related fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming two completed changes in RegisterIP.tsx: removal of all token balance checks/errors and making the file upload input optional with no required constraint.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, page, hook, and config file in the IPGT frontend.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including color tokens for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the IPGT frontend app, setting the page title, favicon, and mounting the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router setup with routes for Home, Register IP, IP Database, and Whitepaper, wrapped in a Layout with a ProfileSetupModal triggered for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the IPGT brand, navigation links, a list of platform features with shield icons, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the IPGT logo, nav links, authenticated user display name, and a login/logout button using Internet Identity — token balance and Dashboard link have been removed.
frontend/src/components/IPCard.tsx: Renders a card UI for a single IP record showing its ID, category badge, title, description, jurisdiction, registration date, and a truncated document hash. Supports click interaction and uses color-coded category labels.
frontend/src/components/IPDetailModal.ts: Displays a detailed modal dialog for an IP record including all metadata fields, the full document hash with copy functionality, and simulated cross-chain transaction info for Ethereum and Solana.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with a consistent full-height layout including a Header and Footer component around a flexible main content area.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Renders a mandatory profile setup dialog for new users, collecting display name, organisation, and optional email, then saving via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationSucc: Shows a success dialog after IP registration, displaying the new IP record ID, ICP canister confirmation, and simulated cross-chain anchoring details for Ethereum and Solana.
frontend/src/components/TokenStats.tsx: A stub component that renders nothing, preserved to avoid breaking imports after the token stats feature was removed.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD and IP record operations (fetch all, search, filter, get by ID, register, transfer ownership).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Playfair Display and Inter fonts, defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers with a dark navy/gold design system and print styles for the whitepaper.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CoinDashboard.tsx: Placeholder page component that renders nothing (returns null).
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, a three-step 'How It Works' explainer, and feature highlights linking to the IP registration and database pages.
frontend/src/pages/IPDatabase.tsx: Searchable and filterable IP record browser with pre-seeded mock records, supporting search by title, category, and jurisdiction filters, with pagination and a detail modal.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx: Form page for registering new IP records, handling Internet Identity authentication, file upload with SHA-256 hashing, and submission via the registerIP mutation with a success modal on completion.
frontend/src/pages/Whitepaper.tsx: Scrollable whitepaper page with a sticky table-of-contents sidebar, intersection-observer-based active section tracking, and a print-to-PDF button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and cleaning URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color palettes (gold, navy, charcoal, chart, sidebar), typography/container-query plugins, and extended font families and border radii.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for IP Global Terminal (IPGT), documenting architecture, existing features, known issues, and design decisions for an ICP-based cryptographic IP registration and timestamping platform.
